{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = Hunter ship
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Hunter ships]] are wedge-shaped vessels covered in an insectoid carapace.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]]'s blue shots hit a Hunter-ship.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c9">''The Captain'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
